entity.label: Jahzeel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Allotted by God, the first of the sons of Naphtali (Gen. 46:24).

nodes.label: Jahzeel
nodes.description: Allotted by God, the first of the sons of Naphtali (Gen. 46:24).

nodes.label: Naphtali
nodes.description: My wrestling, the fifth son of Jacob. His mother was Bilhah, Rachel’s handmaid (Gen. 30:8). When Jacob went down into Egypt, Naphtali had four sons (Gen. 46:24). Little is known of him as an individual.

verses.text: And the sons of Naphtali; Jahzeel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shillem.
Of the sons of Naphtali after their families: of Jahzeel, the family of the Jahzeelites: of Guni, the family of the Gunites:
The sons of Naphtali; Jahziel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shallum, the sons of Bilhah.
